name: One Detroit
description_short: Detroit-based credit union offering comprehensive financial services including checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and credit builder products to local members.
description_long:
One Detroit Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative celebrating 90 years of service as Detroit's premier community financial institution. Founded on cooperative principles, the credit union operates as a non-profit where members are owners rather than customers, distinguishing it from traditional for-profit banks. The organization has expanded its physical footprint, including a recently opened branch in Inkster at the Booker T. Dozier Recreation Center, and maintains multiple locations across the Detroit metropolitan area.

One Detroit offers a comprehensive suite of financial products spanning deposit accounts (checking, savings, CDs, IRAs), consumer lending (auto loans, personal loans, home equity loans, mortgages), credit cards (VISA), and specialized programs like bill consolidation loans, credit builder loans, and buy-now-pay-later options. The credit union also provides digital banking services including mobile banking, bill pay, digital wallets, mobile check deposit, and free credit monitoring. Additionally, they offer a vehicle research tool called "Find My Ride" to help members research and price vehicles, plus Motor City Green Lending for clean energy financing in partnership with Michigan Saves.

What distinguishes One Detroit is its explicit community focus and member-ownership model, positioning itself as more than a banking institution. The credit union emphasizes financial empowerment, offers free financial counseling, and was recognized as the 2024 Outstanding Credit Union by the Michigan Credit Union League. Their specialized programs like the Credit Builder Loan and commitment to serving underbanked populations through products like Young Detroit Checking and Collegiate Checking reflect a community-oriented approach. The partnership with Michigan Saves on clean energy financing demonstrates commitment to broader regional sustainability goals.

One Detroit functions primarily as a traditional financial institution with standard credit union advantages: member ownership, competitive rates, and community focus. However, as a full-service credit union rather than a specialized lender, they compete in crowded banking markets. The website content does not reveal specific APR ranges, fee structures, or membership eligibility requirements beyond geographic/employment-based criteria typical of credit unions. Members gain access to a broad financial ecosystem, but this breadth means they may not specialize in any single product category.
services: Savings accounts and Certificates of Deposit
Motor City Green Lending (clean energy financing)
Find My Ride vehicle research tool
pros: Member-owned cooperative structure means lower fees and profits returned to members
90-year history serving Detroit community with established local branch network
Free credit monitoring included for members
Comprehensive product suite from checking to mortgages in one institution
Specialized credit builder loans explicitly designed to help members establish credit
Free financial counseling available to members
2024 Outstanding Credit Union award from Michigan Credit Union League recognition
Motor City Green Lending partnership for clean energy financing options
cons: Limited to geographic/employment-based membership eligibility like most credit unions
Website does not disclose specific APR ranges or fee schedules for comparison
No 24/7 online account opening process clearly described on website
Competes with larger banks and online lenders that may offer lower rates on specific products
Limited information about overdraft policies and associated fees
best_for: Detroit-area residents seeking community-based banking with member ownership benefits
Individuals building credit who qualify for Credit Builder Loans
Homeowners exploring home equity loans and mortgage refinancing options
Vehicle buyers researching and financing auto purchases through Find My Ride tool
diagnosis: One Detroit is best for Detroit-area residents and credit union-eligible members seeking a full-service financial institution with community roots and member-ownership benefits. The main caveat is that membership eligibility is restricted by geography and employment, and specific rate and fee information is not available on their website, requiring direct contact for detailed pricing comparisons.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
